title: Ñanavara Thera
subtitle: Somdet Phra Buddhaghosacariya
contentHtml:
Uposatha Sila: The Eight-Precept Observance, compiled and written by Somdet Phra Buddhaghosacariya (Ñanavara Thera), translated from the Thai by Bhikkhu Kantasilo (1996; 18pp./55KB)
Questions and answers concerning the observance of Uposatha days — special days for laypeople and monastics alike that follow a lunar calendar and call for renewed commitment to Dhamma practice.
